description: Robbie finally confronts the Ghost Rider inside Mack, bargaining with the entity to return control to his friend. He promises to help the Ghost Rider settle its vengeance in exchange for assisting with Eli Morrow. The spirit leaves Mack and bonds again with Robbie, saving Mack and establishing a temporary truce. Daisy checks on Mack, who is shaken but alive, while Robbie prepares for his ultimate confrontation with Eli.

transcript.line: You're right. I won't survive this without you, but the truth is, you need me, too. We had a deal! How about a new one? Give me my vengeance on Eli. Settle my score, and I'll settle yours. All of yours!
Robbie, that... that thing... He took it out of me.
Are you all right? Some of those things you said... you... You said you were in pain.
No, it's just a rough day. I'm okay.
